role: Root directory for all test suites covering end-to-end, integration, unit, and infrastructure testing of the ArchSpine mirror system.
responsibility: Provides comprehensive automated validation of CLI commands, core modules, scanner engine, lock manager, index recovery, LLM retry logic, view resolution, platform configuration, schema compliance, and system-level behaviors across isolated, integration, and end-to-end scenarios.

children.role: Contains end-to-end and integration tests for the ArchSpine CLI.
This directory contains integration tests for the Scanner engine, verifying its scanning logic and policy-driven file exclusion.
This directory contains a placeholder lock worker subprocess used for testing lock concurrency in ArchSpine's LockManager.
Test directory covering index recovery and LLM retry logic for the ArchSpine summarization system.
This directory contains integration tests that validate the core modules, boundaries, CLI, platform configuration, schema compliance, and system-level behaviors of the ArchSpine mirror system.
Root directory for unit tests verifying all core, infrastructure, and service components of the ArchSpine mirror system.
Test suite for view runtime layer resolution logic. Validates the behavior of resolveViewLayer and resolveEnabledViews under various configurations (env vars, config file settings).
